task_completion.description: GIMP is open with a landscape image loaded
task_completion.visual_evidence: The GIMP application window is visible and active, displaying a natural landscape photograph.

task_completion.description: A rectangular selection is created on the image
task_completion.visual_evidence: Dashed lines ('marching ants') forming a rectangle are visible on the image canvas, covering roughly 30% to 80% of the image area.

task_completion.description: The Stroke Selection dialog is opened
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Stroke Selection' dialog box (accessed via Edit -> Stroke Selection) is visible on the screen, allowing the user to configure the stroke width and color.

task_completion.description: A solid rectangular stroke outline is applied to the image
task_completion.visual_evidence: A distinct, solid-colored rectangular outline is visible on the image canvas, matching the boundaries of the previous selection.

task_completion.description: The modified image is saved/exported to the correct path
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Export Image' dialog is visible with the exact file path '/home/ga/Documents/output.png' entered, or a file manager/terminal shows the file successfully created at this location.

integrity.description: The agent used the GIMP graphical interface to perform the task
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with GIMP tools, menus, and dialogs, rather than terminal commands (like ImageMagick or Python scripts) being used to draw the rectangle.

integrity.description: The agent used the built-in stroke feature rather than manual painting
integrity.visual_evidence: The stroke should be perfectly straight and uniform, indicating the use of the 'Stroke Selection' tool, rather than messy, uneven lines drawn manually with a brush or pencil tool.

integrity.description: The agent actually completed the export process
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent must be seen clicking the final 'Export' button in the dialog, not just typing the filename and abandoning the process.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires using GIMP to edit an 800x533 landscape image. The expected workflow involves using the Rectangle Select tool (shortcut 'R') to create a selection covering 30-80% (ideally 50-70%) of the image, opening 'Edit -> Stroke Selection' to apply the outline, deselecting (Ctrl+Shift+A), and exporting the result (Ctrl+Shift+E) exactly to '/home/ga/Documents/output.png'.
